name: Syncthing
short_description: Continuous file synchronization between devices with peer-to-peer encryption and no cloud depend...
description: Syncthing is a continuous file synchronization program that syncs files between two or more computers in real-time. It replaces proprietary cloud services with an open, decentralized, and private solution. Files are synced directly between your devices using peer-to-peer connections, meani...
usecases: Sync your photos from your phone to your home server automatically when on WiFi.
Keep important documents synchronized across your laptop, desktop, and server without using Dropbox or Google Drive.
Create a private backup solution - sync to a secondary device for redundancy.
Share files with family members using device-to-device synchronization.
notes: Works behind NAT with proper configuration
No account or cloud required - all peer-to-peer
